title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/containerd to v1.7.8
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com) This PR contains the following updates: | Package | Type | Update | Change | |---|---|---|---| | [github.com/containerd/containerd](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd) | require | patch | `v1.7.7` -> `v1.7.8` | --- ### Release Notes
containerd/containerd (github.com/containerd/containerd) ### [`v1.7.8`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/releases/tag/v1.7.8): containerd 1.7.8 [Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/compare/v1.7.7...v1.7.8) Welcome to the v1.7.8 release of containerd! The eighth patch release for containerd 1.7 contains various fixes and updates. ##### Notable Updates - **Fix ambiguous TLS fallback** ([#​9299](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9299)) - **Update Go to 1.20.10** ([#​9265](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9265)) - **Add a new image label on converted schema 1 images** ([#​9252](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9252)) - **Fix handling for missing basic auth credentials** ([#​9235](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9235)) - **Fix potential deadlock in create handler for containerd-shim-runc-v2** ([#​9209](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9209)) See the changelog for complete list of changes Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues. ##### Contributors - Sebastiaan van Stijn - Derek McGowan - Phil Estes - Chen Yiyang - Wei Fu - Akihiro Suda - Maksym Pavlenko - Marat Radchenko - Milas Bowman - Qiutong Song - Samuel Karp ##### Changes
27 commits

- \[release/1.7] Prepare release notes for v1.7.8 ([#​9278](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9278)) - [`48dbdf871`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/48dbdf871b43ca94f243779bd641fcda49c94f66) Prepare release notes for v1.7.8 - \[release/1.7] Fix ambiguous tls fallback ([#​9299](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9299)) - [`68abc543b`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/68abc543b1eb4a8196842de6c83115ba4e5698b0) Check scheme and host of request on push redirect - [`35c7634e3`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/35c7634e33651053a934bbcb831c90ddc65ede2e) Avoid TLS fallback when protocol is not ambiguous - \[release/1.7] vendor: google.golang.org/grpc v1.58.3 ([#​9281](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9281)) - [`f36948cad`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/f36948cad712b9f813518ceaa5ac5441b6e10347) vendor: gRPC v1.58.3 - \[release/1.7 backport] vendor: golang.org/x/net v0.17.0 ([#​9276](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9276)) - [`c67a53190`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/c67a5319050614a947c9e5c133e44164e487a223) vendor: golang.org/x/net v0.17.0 - [`71f4b36ca`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/71f4b36ca7a420d53a9f6c1b3f846a4a94b739de) vendor: golang.org/x/text v0.13.0 - [`a7b3b7090`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/a7b3b70909a99f47845b74a3dbe58032c17bd1e0) vendor: golang.org/x/sys v0.13.0 - \[release/1.7] vendor: google.golang.org/grpc v1.56.3 ([#​9248](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9248)) - [`26736d6e1`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/26736d6e1af5f45386ae9382a6a951aee33c9ca7) vendor: google.golang.org/grpc v1.56.3 - [`54a69a6e4`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/54a69a6e448d61fe88ad90bd476f8f65cf21277f) vendor: golang.org/x/oauth2 v0.7.0 - [`ac15a7f5b`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/ac15a7f5b9da1b45ffc66bb8ccdcaed2f571c73a) vendor: google.golang.org/protobuf v1.30.0 - \[release/1.7] update to go1.20.10, test go1.21.3 ([#​9265](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9265)) - [`2479c3321`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/2479c332173014f3086d9b016214c536a7c03f39) \[release/1.7] update to go1.20.10, test go1.21.3 - [`11f40e9d8`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/11f40e9d80409b8dfa9dcb3eb81934e08384dd8e) \[release/1.7] update to go1.20.9, test go1.21.2 - \[release/1.7] Add a new image label if it is docker schema 1 ([#​9252](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9252)) - [`cac1bab79`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/cac1bab797ed8d1245bff49aa90e6c80d8714899) Add a new image label if it is docker schema 1 - \[release/1.7] remotes: add handling for missing basic auth credentials ([#​9235](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9235)) - [`6cd2cc4a8`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/6cd2cc4a8f035162e06d5ffbf868c540e7eb40eb) remotes: add handling for missing basic auth credentials - \[release/1.7 backport] containerd-shim-runc-v2: avoid potential deadlock in create handler ([#​9209](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/9209)) - [`d0a1fedb5`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/d0a1fedb5a4828daddff330a345780d0222e47e8) \*: add runc-fp as runc wrapper to inject failpoint - [`04491240a`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/04491240af1766337e0fbb5145405f74a39f5ad5) containerd-shim-runc-v2: avoid potential deadlock in create handler - [`6982a0df5`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/6982a0df5bc0d31ae82f0810518550006bf90931) containerd-shim-runc-v2: remove unnecessary `s.getContainer()` - [`0e2320398`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/0e2320398f0fb9974232ef68ea70625645f42661) Uncopypaste parsing of OCI Bundle spec file

##### Dependency Changes - **golang.org/x/crypto** v0.11.0 -> v0.14.0 - **golang.org/x/mod** v0.9.0 -> v0.11.0 - **golang.org/x/net** v0.13.0 -> v0.17.0 - **golang.org/x/oauth2** v0.4.0 -> v0.10.0 - **golang.org/x/sync** v0.1.0 -> v0.3.0 - **golang.org/x/sys** v0.10.0 -> v0.13.0 - **golang.org/x/term** v0.10.0 -> v0.13.0 - **golang.org/x/text** v0.11.0 -> v0.13.0 - **golang.org/x/tools** v0.7.0 -> v0.10.0 - **google.golang.org/genproto** [`7f2fa6f`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/7f2fa6fef1f4) -> [`782d3b1`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/782d3b101e98) - **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/api** [`782d3b1`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/782d3b101e98) ***new*** - **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc** [`782d3b1`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/782d3b101e98) ***new*** - **google.golang.org/grpc** v1.53.0 -> v1.58.3 - **google.golang.org/protobuf** v1.29.1 -> v1.31.0 Previous release can be found at [v1.7.7](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/releases/tag/v1.7.7)
